description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit a booking request for an initial speech evaluation for a 5-year-old at the downtown clinic, choosing the earliest available weekday appointment between May 10 and May 20 that starts at or after 3:00 PM.

target_names: Initial Speech Evaluation · Main Clinic - Downtown · 2026-05-11 3:00 PM

tasks.name: Submit a booking request for an initial speech evaluation for a 5-year-old at the downtown clinic, choosing the earliest available weekday appointment between May 10 and May 20 that starts at or after 3:00 PM.

tasks.instruction: From the therapist directory, filter for providers who specialize in autism and work with teens, sort the results by years of experience from most to least, compare the first two therapists shown, and for the one with more experience add them to your favorites and submit an appointment request including a teen client's name and preferred day and time range.

tasks.instruction: In the parent resources section, save three sensory processing articles for ages 3–5 that each have a listed reading time of at least 5 minutes, then open your saved reading list.

target_names: 10 Calming Sensory Play Ideas for Ages 3–5

tasks.instruction: Find a social skills group for children aged 8–10 taking place next calendar month that costs under $50 per child, and complete registration for the earliest starting qualifying group using a sample child name, age, and session time.

tasks.instruction: Use the cost estimator to calculate the estimated monthly fee for 4 speech therapy sessions and 2 occupational therapy sessions under the in-network insurance plan whose description notes that most families pay only a copay after the deductible is met, then send a contact form requesting a detailed monthly quote for that exact mix of sessions under that plan, explicitly naming the plan in your message.

expected_values.selected_plan_description_snippet: Most families pay only a copay after deductible is met

insurance_plan_filter.description_contains: most families pay only a copay after deductible is met

tasks.instruction: Using the locations finder, search near ZIP code 94110, filter for clinics within 15 miles that offer free parking and are open on Saturdays, select the nearest result, and submit a callback request with a sample phone number, preferred call time, and brief note about Saturday appointments.

tasks.instruction: With the weekly scheduling tool, create a plan for one child by adding three sessions—speech therapy on Tuesday at 4:00 PM for 60 minutes, occupational therapy on Thursday at 5:30 PM for 60 minutes, and counseling on Saturday at 11:00 AM for 45 minutes—and then save the plan with a custom name.

tasks.instruction: On the donation page, set up a one-time $75 pledge allocated to the fund that provides need-based therapy scholarships for children, add an “in honor of” dedication for “The Garcia Family,” and submit the pledge form with your contact details and preferred contact method.

expected_values.fund_description_snippet: Provides need-based scholarships so children can access therapy services
